titleStmt.title: SII 37.63: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 63. (A.R. No. B 364 of 1938-39.) Dēvuni-Cuddapah, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Veṅkaṭēśa-perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1484, Dundubhi, Pushya śu. 15, Saturday, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1563 A.D., January 9, Saturday.

Damaged. It records the construction of a stone maṇḍapa in the south-west corner of the temple of Tiruveṅgaḷanātha at Kaḍapa by Appagāri Yallappa, the ūḷigam of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Naṁdeḷa Avubhaḷēśvaradēva-mahārāja. The same donor laid a garden to the same deity and also granted some land and cash (details not clear) for the maintenance of the maṇḍapa. The gifts are stated to have been made for the merit of donor's overlord on the occasion of the lunar eclipse.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 262.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
livāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1484 Agunēṭi
duṁdubhi saṁvatsara puśya śu 15 na śrīmadrā
jādhirājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
vīrasadāsivadēva mahārāyalu vidyana
garamaṁdu vajrasiṁhvasanārūḍhuṁḍai
pṛthivi sāṁmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu śrī
matē rāmānujāyanamaḥ Akhilāṁḍakō
ṭi braṁhmaṁḍa nāyakulaina dēvadēvōttamulaina
śrīkaḍapa tiruveṁgaḷanāthadēvuni śrī pādapa
dmaṁbulaku dāsānudāsuṁḍai śrīmanma
hāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdēḷa Avubhaḷēśvaradēva ma
hārājuluṁgāri vūḷigeṁ Appagāri
yallappa Anaṁttamulayina daṁḍḍamulu
sama¨rppiṁccina bhūdāna dha¨rmaśāsanakrama
meṭlaṁnnanu kaḍapa grāmānanu kaḍapa tiruvēṁ
gaḷanātani kōvilalōnu nayiruti mūlanu nē
nu kaṭṭiṁcina rātimaṁḍapamuṁnnu yī kōvilaku
paḍamara viyyapu kāluvaku dakṣiṇaṁnanu vēyiṁ
cina śrīṁgāraṁ tōṁṭanuṁnu yīreṁḍu sēvalu
ṁnu nā svāmipēra Avubhaḷrājayyavāriki puṇyaṁ
gānu ta tadhātidhināṁḍu śōmagrahaṇa puṁ
ṇyakālamaṁdu kaḍapa tiruveṁgaḷanāthaniki dāra
vōsiyistini . trivācakaṁgānu trikaraṇaśudigānu
dāravōsi yistini . yī maṁḍapānaku pulivōya nā
rasiṁharājayyavāri Ānati pramāṇkaṁ maḍi mu
ḍi Ē maḍi kānamaḍi 2 nu vubhayaṁ
maḍi khaṁ nu mārapa koḍuku
vuttarōttara sa¨rvamānyaṁgānuvolasa pallimaḍi 2 I
dumu yēḍudumunnu svāmiki sa
yī maṁḍapaṁ kha 10 ki rokhaṁga
¨rga namā vāśa 1
4 na 8 paṁṇyāraṁvaḷi
¨rnu . ga 4 nu na 1 ki 1 lekhanu
yāṁḍādikiṁnni paṁcca
rālapa yiṁduku paṁṇyā
raṁpala jaku Ayidu nu
dārā
yi Avubhaḷrājayanā
puṇyaṁgā tānu kaṭiṁcci
runidu
vuttarōttarasa¨rvamānya
maṁḍḍapaṁ muṁdari
padilaṁphagā kaṭiṁstini ga
naka modalayinavi nēmu śēsināramu
naḍapaka vicciri nēnu vāri sēvaku

gaṁggakaru gōbrāṁhmani vadhiṁcina pāpāna
bōvuduru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyapara
dattānupālanaṁ sva
dattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavēt . śrī . dānapālana
yō¨rmadhyē dānāccēyōnupāla
naṁ . dānatsva¨rgamavāpnōti pā
lanādacyutaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 37.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
